creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
My installation was fixed with a 2021-05-30 patch from tcberner@ 

Following my confirmation of success (2021-05-31) with the patch, in IRC: 

> ok, I'll commit it, thanks for testing

Kurt Hindenburg (2021-06-03) at <https://bugs.kde.org/show_bug.cgi?id=436242#c7>: 

> … Adriaan and I basically came up with the same patch. …
